OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector (types of observables to enrich).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Whether the connector should run automatically when an entity is created or updated.

DOPPEL_API_KEY.description: Doppel API key, sent as the `x-api-key` header.

DOPPEL_USER_API_KEY.description: Doppel user API key, sent as the `x-user-api-key` header.

DOPPEL_TAGS.description: List of tags to attach to the alerts created in Doppel.

DOPPEL_TAKEDOWN_COMMENT.description: Comment sent to Doppel when requesting a takedown.

DOPPEL_MAX_TLP.description: Max TLP level of entities to enrich (empty = no limit).
